etymology.description: đ ‚ą depicts flowers hanging from a plant -> ancient form of ĺž‚(ĺž‚)
etymology.interpretation: The character đ ‚ą visually represents flowers suspended from a plant, illustrating how they hang naturally. It is an ancient form directly linked to ĺž‚(ĺž‚) (chuĂ­, 'hang'), emphasizing the floral aspect.
